title: Creative Writing
subject: Language Arts
description: Express yourself through sentences, stories, and descriptions
curriculum: Jamaica NSC Grade 2 - Language Arts Strand: Writing (Composition, Creative Expression)
nscObjectives: Write complete sentences with subject and predicate
Compose short paragraphs with a main idea
Write narrative texts with beginning, middle, and end
Use descriptive words to add detail
Write friendly letters with proper format

sections.name: Complete the Sentence
sections.instruction: Finish each sentence with your own words.

questions.prompt:
Complete this sentence:

My favourite food is ______________ because ______________.
questions.hint: Think about what you love to eat and why!

questions.prompt:
Complete this sentence:

On the weekend, I like to ______________.
questions.hint: What fun things do you do when there's no school?

questions.prompt:
Complete this sentence:

My best friend is special because ______________.
questions.hint: Think about what makes your friend a good friend!

questions.prompt:
Imagine a beautiful beach. Describe what you see:

(Think about: the water, the sand, the sky, the people)
questions.hint: Use describing words like blue, warm, sunny, soft!

questions.prompt:
Imagine your classroom. Describe what you see:

(Think about: the desks, the board, the windows, your teacher)
questions.hint: What things are in your classroom? What colours do you see?

sections.name: Write a Short Story
sections.instruction: Write 4-5 sentences about the topic. Use capital letters and full stops.

questions.prompt:
Topic: My First Day in Grade 2

Write about:
• What you did
• How you felt
• One thing you liked
questions.hint: Start with 'On my first day...' Remember capitals and full stops!

questions.prompt:
Topic: A Happy Day at Home

Write about:
• Who was with you
• What you did
• Why it was a happy day

Topic: My Favourite Animal

Write about:
• What animal it is
• What it looks like
• Why you like it
questions.hint: Use describing words! What colour is it? Is it big or small?

sections.name: Write a Letter
sections.instruction: Write a short letter to someone special.

questions.prompt:
Write a short letter to your teacher thanking them for teaching you.

Remember to include:
• Dear ___
• Your message (2-3 sentences)
• From ___
questions.hint: Start with 'Dear Miss/Mr ___,' and end with 'From, Morgan'

sections.name: Put Sentences in Order
sections.instruction: Choose the correct order to make a story that makes sense.

questions.prompt: Which sentence should come FIRST in a story about getting ready for school?
options: I walked to the bus stop.
I woke up early in the morning.
I said goodbye to my mother.
questions.correct: I woke up early in the morning.
questions.hint: What do you do first when you wake up?

questions.prompt: Which sentence should come LAST in a story about getting ready for school?
options: I got on the bus to school.
questions.correct: I got on the bus to school.
questions.hint: Where are you going? That's the end of getting ready!
